name: docker-helper-ai
description: Docker Helper Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_dockerfile
tools.description: Generate a Dockerfile. Languages: python, node, go, rust, static.

tools.name: parse_compose
tools.description: Parse and analyze a docker-compose YAML string (basic YAML parser).

tools.name: optimize_image
tools.description: Analyze a Dockerfile and suggest optimizations.

tools.name: security_scan_data
tools.description: Scan Dockerfile for security issues (static analysis).
